description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a cache keyed by the job name storing .cabal-store and dist-newstyle/cache, sets a STORE_DIR variable to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.cabal-store, and runs a before_script updating apt and cabal. Define three jobs named test:8.0, test:8.2, and test:8.4, all in the default test stage. The test:8.0 job uses the haskell:8.0 Docker image and runs "apt -qq install build-essential netbase xz-utils libstdc++-4.9-dev > /dev/null", then "cabal install --enable-test --only-dep -j", and "cabal build". The test:8.2 job uses the haskell:8.2 image and runs "cabal --store-dir=$STORE_DIR new-build". The test:8.4 job uses the haskell:8.4 image and runs "cabal --store-dir=$STORE_DIR new-build".
